evals.name: bootstrap-module-api
evals.prompt: In an Aquilia workspace, create a new orders module with workspace Module pointer, AppManifest, service injection, and CRUD controller routes. Explain which files to edit and which CLI commands can verify it.
evals.expected_output: Uses aquilia-workspace-bootstrap, aquilia-module-manifest-builder, aquilia-controller-api-builder, and aquilia-di-service-builder without deprecated workspace component registration.

evals.name: auth-db-testing
evals.prompt: Add authenticated project CRUD backed by SQLite models, sessions, and tests using Aquilia testing utilities. Include migration and validation workflow.
evals.expected_output: Uses auth/session, database/ORM/migrations, blueprint validation, and testing skills with source-backed constraints.

evals.name: ops-deploy-audit
evals.prompt: Audit an Aquilia app before production deployment to Render, including security hardening, artifacts, deploy generation, admin, cache/storage, and runtime lifecycle checks.
evals.expected_output: Uses framework audit, runtime lifecycle debugger, security hardening, artifacts, deploy provider render, and admin/cache/storage skills.
